section_title: The finder of goods has no right to sue the owner for compensation for
content:
168. The finder of goods has no right to sue the owner for compensation for
finder of
trouble and expense voluntarily incurred by him to preserve the goods and to
goods; may
sue for find out the owner; but he may retain the goods against the owner until he
specific

reward
